'''Quarren Command Center 12''' was one of the [[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League's]] command centers on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. During the [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]], it held out after the League's leadership was captured by [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]], now receiving orders from the [[Moappa]].

==Appearances==
*{{CWACite|1|Fierce Currents}}
